title: Kyrenia、Kyrenia District — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Kyrenia、Kyrenia Districtの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

KyreniaはKyrenia Districtにある人口33,000の都市です。A stunning harbor town on the northern coast, dominated by a Byzantine castle, with a picturesque waterfront, a historic shipwreck museum, and beautiful mountain views.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
